title: Cantonese-Style Fish Tacos
description: A fusion dish that combines the flavors of China and Mexico. Crispy fish is served in a taco shell with a sweet and spicy sauce.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Dredge fish fillets in a mixture of cornstarch and spices until evenly coated.
Add fish to skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side or until cooked through.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble tacos by placing cooked fish in a tortilla, topping with Cantonese-style sauce, sliced green onions, radishes, and cilantro.
Serve with a lime wedge and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
